chapter_title.ar: باب شَهَادَةِ الْوَالِدِ لِلْوَلَدِ وَ شَهَادَةِ الْوَلَدِ لِلْوَالِدِ وَ شَهَادَةِ الْأَخِ لِأَخِيهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 15 – Testimony of the father for the son, and the testimony of the son for the father, and testimony of the brother for his brother

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (24/243)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (24/243)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ شَهَادَةِ الْوَلَدِ لِوَالِدِهِ وَ الْوَالِدِ لِوَلَدِهِ وَ الْأَخِ لِأَخِيهِ قَالَ فَقَالَ تَجُوزُ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Yunus, from Zurara, from Sama’at, from Abu Baseer who said,
‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about the testimony of the son for his parent and of the parent for his son, and of the brother for his brother’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Allowed’.
en.sarwar: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Yunus from Zur’ah from Sama‘ah from abu Basir who has narrated the following: “I once asked abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the testimony of a father for his son or a son’s testimony for his father and the testimony of a brother for his brother. He (the Imam) said, ’It is permissible.’”
